name: Victor Luna
bio: Victor brings years of hands-on expertise in woodworking and construction. His passion for quality craftsmanship and dedication to client satisfaction drives 3 Wood Construction's reputation for excellence throughout the Wilmington area.

name: Jesus Luna
bio: Jesus is the creative force behind 3 Wood Construction's most intricate designs. His mastery of both traditional woodworking techniques and modern design concepts makes every project unique and truly special.
